code: import React,{useEffect}from'react';import{useState}from'react';import'../../styles/Main.css';import logo from'../../assets/logo.png';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{useSearchParams}from'react-router-dom';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function MealSessions(){const navigate=useNavigate();const[searchParams]=useSearchParams();const[sessions,setSessions]=useState([]);const id=searchParams.get('id');useEffect(()=>{async function fetchSessions(){try{const response=await fetch("/get-meal-sessions?patientID=".concat(id),{method:'GET',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});const data=await response.json();setSessions(data.sessions);}catch(err){console.error('Error fetching meal sessions:',err);return[];}}fetchSessions();},[id]);function goToMeal(mealID){navigate('/meal-analytics?id='+mealID);}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("link",{href:"https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poltawski+Nowy:ital,wght@0,400..700;1,400..700&display=swap",rel:"Main.css"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:logo,alt:"Logo",className:"Logo"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"caregiverBox",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"User List"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"scrollBox2",children:sessions.map((session,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"scrollMealButtons",onClick:()=>goToMeal(session.meal_id),children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"mealStyler",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:session.meal_date}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:session.meal_type})]})},index))})]})]});}export default MealSessions;
